title: ManimGL Custom Configuration
description: Configuration schema for manimgl custom_config.yml. See: https://3b1b.github.io/manim/

directories.description: Directory paths for manimgl output and caching.

output.description: Base output directory. Videos go to <output>/videos/, images to <output>/images/.

mirror_module_path.description: When true, output files are saved in a subdirectory matching the source file path.

temporary_storage.description: Directory for temporary files during rendering.

preamble.description: Custom LaTeX preamble added to all Tex documents.

template.description: Name of the tex template to use (from tex_templates.yml).

use_ctex.description: Use ctex package for Chinese/Japanese/Korean text support.

frame_height.description: Height of the animation frame in manim units.

colors.description: Custom color definitions. Manimgl defines color palettes like blue_e through blue_a, red_e through red_a, etc.

resolution.description: Default output resolution in pixels (width x height). e.g., '1920x1080'.

fps.description: Default frames per second for output video.

background_color.description: Background color as hex string (e.g., '#000000') or named color.

size.description: Default window size. Use 'default' for auto-sizing.

full_screen.description: Open the preview window in full screen mode.

always_on_top.description: Keep the preview window always on top.

universal_import_line.description: Import line executed automatically when entering interactive mode.

ignore_manimlib_modules_on_reload.description: When true, manimlib internal modules are not reloaded on autoreload.

style.description: Visual style presets for manimgl scenes.
